data.title: Firefly Aerospace (FLY) Is Up 16.5% After NVIDIA-Powered Lunar Imaging Deal - Has The Bull Case Changed?
data.description:

The €200m investment for a 1.5% fully diluted stake in US based exchange Kraken gives Deutsche Börse a direct position in one of the larger global crypto trading venues, alongside listed peers such as Coinbase and institutional players like CME Group that are also active around digital assets. For you as an investor, the key angle is less about the small ownership percentage and more about access to technology, liquidity and client flow that can sit alongside Deutsche Börse’s existing exchange, clearing and data businesses. The earlier 2025 partnership laid groundwork on infrastructure, and this equity stake now ties the two platforms closer together in an area where regulation, custody and compliance are central for institutional users.

  • Execution and integration demands from a crypto partnership may stretch management bandwidth at a time when the narrative already flags leadership transition and cost pressures as areas to monitor.

  • 🎁 If institutional demand for regulated digital asset trading grows, Deutsche Börse’s link with Kraken could strengthen its appeal to clients seeking exchange traded, cleared and crypto solutions under one umbrella.
